channel.title: Quarvo Changelog
channel.description: What we shipped, when we shipped it. Public log of Quarvo updates — features, improvements, security advisories, and architectural changes.

item.title: Conversion optimization layer (Phase 7)
item.description: Three additions: Vercel Analytics + Speed Insights on all 13 indexable pages (privacy-first, no cookies); exit-intent modal on /for-merchants with email capture for the high-AOV decline recovery checklist; floating scroll-depth CTA on long-form pages (blog index, compare, security). All gated on prefers-reduced-motion and keyboard-accessible.

item.title: Trust & launch assets shipped (Phase 6)
item.description: Three new pages live: /security with full data-flow diagrams and SOC 2 roadmap, /changelog (this page), and /brand with downloadable logo assets. The security page in particular is built for high-AOV merchant due diligence.

item.title: Interactive split-payment demo on the home page (Phase 5)
item.description: Added a new #demo section that simulates the customer experience end-to-end. Auto-plays once when section enters viewport. Two manual modes: Replay and Try interactively. Two-phase commit visualization with live clock 0.00 → 0.86s.

item.title: Comparison pages: Quarvo vs BNPL, Klarna, Affirm, Afterpay (Phase 4)
item.description: Five new pages under /compare with side-by-side breakdowns of every meaningful dimension — customer cost, merchant fees, credit reporting, late-fee mechanics, AOV-band fit. Three rules: numbers sourced and dated, where competitors win we say so, structural not adversarial.

item.title: Launch polish — sitemap, robots, branded 404, OG tags (Phase 2.9)
item.description: Polish pass to make the site feel ready to ship. sitemap.xml with all 22 indexable URLs, robots.txt, branded 404 with suggested routes, and og:image + twitter:image meta tags added to every blog post.

item.title: Five merchant-angle blog posts (Phase 3)
item.description: Five new deep-dives for high-AOV merchants: Hidden Cost of Declined Sales, Why $2K+ AOV Converts Worse, Stripe Connect + Multi-Card Splitting, Recovery Rate Benchmarks, and the Merchant Playbook for High-AOV Recovery.

item.title: /pay-with-quarvo integration docs (Phase 2.8)
item.description: End-to-end developer documentation: API reference, Stripe Connect setup, drop-in JS snippets for Shopify and WooCommerce, server SDK examples, webhook signatures, and brand kit.

item.title: /for-merchants pricing tiers + lead capture (Phase 2.8)
item.description: Pricing section added to /for-merchants with two tiers: Direct API (2% per recovered, no monthly minimum) and Shopify+Woo (managed integration). Lead capture form posts to app.quarvo.io/api/merchants/register.

item.title: Section reorder + SEO refresh (Phase 2.6 + 2.7)
item.description: Cut the dual consumer/merchant flow on the home page in favor of single merchant-first narrative. Reorganized sections so value proposition compounds. Refreshed all meta titles and OG tags to match Architecture 2 framing.

item.title: Integrations + Trust/Security sections (Phase 2.5)
item.description: Three integration tiles for Shopify, WooCommerce, and Direct API. Trust/Security section featuring Stripe Connect, atomic commitment, and PCI scope reduction.

item.title: How it works — sticky-scroll narrative (Phase 2.4)
item.description: Sticky-scroll storytelling section where the visual on the left changes as the user scrolls through three steps on the right.

item.title: Live ROI calculator (Phase 2.3)
item.description: Two-input ROI calculator (AOV × monthly orders) with bidirectional slider sync, animated number ticking, and yearly projection. Models industry-blend recovery economics.

item.title: Hero redesign + motion infrastructure (Phase 2.1 + 2.2)
item.description: New hero with word-stagger entrance, shimmer-text gradient, and atmospheric orb background. Built motion.js as shared motion infrastructure (reveal observer, magnetic hover, tilt, spotlight, kinetic numbers).

item.title: UI/UX overhaul — accessibility, SVG icons, structural cleanup
item.description: Comprehensive accessibility pass: ARIA semantic markup, mobile meta tags, focus states. Migrated all emoji icons to inline SVG. Extracted ~127 inline styles to scoped CSS classes.

item.title: First five blog posts (consumer-angle)
item.description: Initial editorial drop targeting consumer search intent: split payments, multi-card workarounds, BNPL alternatives, large-purchase how-tos.

item.title: Loops API integration + waitlist deploy
item.description: Initial waitlist live. Email capture posts to /api/subscribe, syncs to Loops with mailing-list segmentation.

item.title: Initial deploy to Vercel — quarvo.io live
item.description: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS landing page deployed to Vercel. Domain wired (quarvo.io + www.quarvo.io with proper redirects). Brand identity, color tokens, and typography system established.
